title: Murder at Blackwood Manor
subtitle: An LLM-powered detective mystery

setting.place: Blackwood Manor, an English country house
setting.weather: A stormy evening with heavy rain and wind

victim.name: Edward Blackwood
victim.description: Edward Blackwood was a powerful and controlling publisher whose wealth, cruelty, and secrets gave several people reasons to fear or resent him.

premise: Edward Blackwood is found murdered in his private library after dinner during a storm at Blackwood Manor. Every guest had a reason to want him dead: inheritance, romantic humiliation, family resentment, or fear of exposure. The player must investigate the manor, examine clues, interview suspects, and make a final accusation.

player_role.title: Detective
player_role.description: The player acts as the investigator called to solve Edward Blackwood's murder. The player can question suspects, inspect locations, collect clues, and make a final accusation.

main_objective: Discover who killed Edward Blackwood, why they killed him, how the murder was committed, and which evidence proves the accusation.
core_gameplay_loop: Use discovered clues to confront suspects
stretch_goals: Free-form final accusation evaluated by an LLM
FAISS-based retrieval for clue and dialogue memory
